title: Kyglaring LED Lighting Kit Compatible with Lego Diagon Alley Wizarding Shops 76444 Building Blocks, Lighting Accessories for Lego 76444 Model Set (Not Include Models)
features: 【Refined Details】Kyglaring Light kit is specially designed for Lego 76444 building blocks, upgraded lighting accessories with built-in high-quality LED lights that emit soft, non-glaring light, perfectly compatible with Lego 76444 set. The lamp holder features a hidden cable design, with preset spacing ensuring easy installation and hidden wiring. It transforms a static model into a dazzling shadow feast, infusing a soul into a beloved collection.

【Enjoy the assembly fun】Kyglaring Provide detailed video/PDF installation instructions(Online) and step-by-step numbered light bags, even a novice can easily get started and enjoy the fun of DIY, the specially designed snap-on connector will gently respond to every touch, making the transformation process into an intimate ritual of dialogue with the model. Parts are small and not fragile. DON'T pull wires too hard.(Note: Lighting kit does not include the main model)

【Safe and Durable】Our Building Blocks 76444 light kit is made of high quality materials, the shell is stretched tightly, provides 5 V power for all lights, USB cable and battery box (batteries not included) can be powered by mobile/wall power and/or other USB devices (maximum power should be 6 F). When other light sets start to dim, our kit still holds that warm glow for you on a rainy night after three years.(Please test each light part before assembling)

【Lighting Kit Only, Model Not Included】 Kyglaring LED light kit compatible with Lego 76444 set and transforms your model into a vibrant display piece. Without lighting, your Building Blocks may look plain—but our lights kit bring it to life, adding stunning detail and creating a dramatic visual impact. Perfect for showcasing in your home, office, or collector’s shelf.

【Aftermarket service】A beautiful creative experience shouldn't be interrupted by any technical difficulties, Kyglaring will provide you with an exclusive light and shadow consultant. If you encounter any difficulties when using the product, we will help you solve the problem in time.

【Ideal Gift Choice】This LED light will be a birthday gift, Christmas gift, New Year's gift, Children's Day gift, graduation gift, Thanksgiving gift, Valentine's Day gift for any model building enthusiast. It can provide bright light to your bricks in the dark, making the model a charming display in showrooms, storage shelves, tables.
description: Product description Born from a passion for brilliant design, Kyglaring combines smart engineering with a deep love for creative builders. Whether it's a room decoration, a gift, or an interactive moment for parents and children, Kyglaring transforms static models into interactive wonders. Flick the switch and watch your creations come to life - this is where light meets infinite creativity. Every set is meticulously crafted and backed by a reliable warranty and 24/7 customer support—because your vision deserves flawless brilliance. Safety Warning /
